title: Make verification and closeout evidence fail closed
description: Fix final-review blockers: empty Testing must not count as a passed integrated gate; closeout evidence must map each acceptance item only to its own controller-issued commands; process prompts/controller enforcement must honor project Rules including required PR/CI evidence or a human gate. Add outside-in tests.
acceptance_criteria: No implementation tick closes without configured integrated evidence; cross-item evidence cannot certify acceptance; configured Rules are enforced before epic closure, with unmet external evidence surfaced as an actionable gate; tests pass.
